name: Adyen
description: Adyen — Unified payments platform processing cards, wallets, and local methods globally with acquiring, issuing, and data analytics.

seo.title: Adyen Review 2026: Pricing, Alternatives & Lock-in Score
seo.meta_description: Complete Adyen analysis: pricing, lock-in risk, migration difficulty. Compare with alternatives in Payment Gateway / PSP.

lock_in.explanation: Medium — proprietary tokens, but CSV import/export under

transparency.reason: Hybrid interchange++ pricing with negotiated fees

developer_experience.reason: Strong SDKs in 10+ languages, excellent docs, test tools

when_to_use: Enterprise with $10M+ TPV needing global coverage
when_not_to_use: Startup with <$1M TPV — minimum fees are high
Need quick self-serve setup — Stripe is faster

migration_cheatsheet.risk_notes: Medium — proprietary tokens, but CSV import/export under
migration_cheatsheet.tip: Moderate effort required. Export data before canceling

review.verdict: Best for enterprise with $10m+ tpv needing global coverage. Adyen offers EUR 0.11 + scheme fee. Moderate vendor lock-in.
pros: Enterprise with $10M+ TPV needing global coverage
cons: Startup with <$1M TPV — minimum fees are high
Need quick self-serve setup — Stripe is faster
Proprietary data formats add switching costs
